abolish magic.name: Abolish Magic
abolish magic.description: Abolish magic from your target, removing two harmful effects.

acuity.name: Acuity
acuity.description: Hastens the mind of an ally, increasing their Casting Speed by 10% for 30 minutes.

adrenaline.name: Adrenaline
adrenaline.description: Haste your target, increasing their Melee and Ranged Attack Speed by 20% (L16) to 25% (L32) for 1 hour.
notes: Requires Line of Sight on Cast.

afflicting ailment.name: Afflicting Ailment
afflicting ailment.description: Infect your target with a disease, dealing 55 Disease Damage every 6 seconds for 1 minute.
notes: Requires Line of Sight on Cast

aimed shot.name: Aimed Shot
aimed shot.description: Fire an Aimed Shot at your target, dealing 100%(L1) to 150%(L60) Physical Damage, and reduce incoming healing effects by 50% for 30 seconds. Additionally, if your target is below 20% health, this ability rolls its damage twice.

allegro assai.name: Allegro Assai
allegro assai.description: Inspire your group with an energetic allegro, increasing their Attack Speed by 40% (L44) to 50% (L48) for 18 seconds.

allegro con brio.name: Allegro con Brio
allegro con brio.description: A quick paced song with brilliance and spirit, which increases the Spell Casting Speed of your group by 10%.

allegro con fuoco.name: Allegro con Fuoco
allegro con fuoco.description: A quick paced song with passion and energy, which increases the Melee Attack Speed of your group by 10%.

allegro lento.name: Allegro Lento
allegro lento.description: Inspire your group with an energetic allegro, increasing their Attack Speed by 10% (L12) to 20% (L16) for 18 seconds.

allegro moderato.name: Allegro Moderato
allegro moderato.description: Inspire your group with an energetic allegro, increasing their Attack Speed by 25% (L28) to 35% (L32) for 18 seconds.

ambush.name: Ambush
ambush.description: Stabs your target from behind, for 100% (L1) to 250% (L60) Weapon Damage, and an additional 5 (L1) to 70 (L60) Melee Damage. Requires Stealth. Must be used from behind target.
effects: Decrease Hitpoints by 100% (L1) to 250% (L60) and an additional 5 (L1) to 70 (L60)
notes: Requires Stealth to be active
Must be behind target

amnesia.name: Amnesia
amnesia.description: Manipulate the mind of your target, granting them a chance to forget past wrongdoings every 6 seconds for 30 seconds.

ancient guardian.name: Ancient Guardian
ancient guardian.description: Summons a holy, ancient guardian to assist you in battle. The ancient guardian heals you and other friendly targets. Persists for 30 seconds, or until death of pet or master.
notes: Ancient Guardian casts the healing spell Divine Light

anguish.name: Anguish
anguish.description: Causes anguish to your target's mental state, causing 750 points of Magic Damage and decreasing their Intelligence, Wisdom, Charisma, and Mana Regeneration by 25.

anxiety.name: Anxiety
anxiety.description: Causes anxiety to your target's mental state, causing 225 points of Magic Damage and decreasing their Intelligence, Wisdom, Charisma, and Mana Regeneration by 15.

appease.name: Appease
appease.description: Appease an aggressive target, greatly reducing the range of their social and proximity aggro for 3 minutes. Has no effect on an already aggroed target. This ability has a slight chance to fail and cause primary and social aggro. It also has the slight chance of ending early.

appease the masses.name: Appease the Masses
appease the masses.description: Appeases your target, reducing their Body Aggro Radius for 3 minutes. This spell has a very slight chance of ending early. This spell does not work on Social Aggro.

arcane aegis.name: Arcane Aegis
arcane aegis.description: Surround yourself with an arcane aegis, granting you immunity to spell damage for 15 seconds. This spell can be used while stunned, incapacitated, or feared. This spell inflicts Exhausted Soul upon expiration, preventing the application of immunity effects for 30 seconds.

arcane bonds.name: Arcane Bonds
arcane bonds.description: Summon Arcane Bonds, that cling to the feet of your target and three other targets within 8 meters, applying a 50% Snare effect for 2 minutes.

arcane infusion.name: Arcane Infusion
arcane infusion.description: Infuse your mind with the arcane, increasing your Mana Regeneration by 1 (L1) to 10 (L60) and Spell Haste by 10% for 1 hour. Additionally, when you land a killing blow with any of your offensive spells, a portion of the spell's Mana cost is refunded based on the effective damage dealt.

arcane invocation.name: Arcane Invocation
arcane invocation.description: Invoke the arcane, restoring 55 (L20) to 165 (L60) Mana as you channel every 2 seconds for 10 seconds.
effects: Increase Mana by 55 (L20) to 165 (L60) every 2 seconds

arcane protection.name: Arcane Protection
arcane protection.description: Surrounds a group member with a magically impenetrable shield, making them invulnerable to magic for 15 seconds. Also grants Exhausted Soul, preventing you from receiving another immunity buff for 1 minute.

arcane shackles.name: Arcane Shackles
arcane shackles.description: Summon Arcane Shackles that cling to the feet of your target and three other targets within 8 meters, applying a 60% Snare effect for 4 minutes.

arcane spear i.name: Arcane Spear I
arcane spear i.description: Hurl a spear of arcane energy at your target, dealing 3 (L1) to 10 (L11) Magic Damage. While Arcane Infusion is active, the Mana cost of this spell is reduced by 25%.

arcane spear ii.name: Arcane Spear II
arcane spear ii.description: Hurl a spear of arcane energy at your target, dealing 28 (L12) to 40 (L25) Magic Damage. While Arcane Infusion is active, the Mana cost of this spell is reduced by 25%.

arcane spear iii.name: Arcane Spear III
arcane spear iii.description: Hurl a spear of arcane energy at your target, dealing 75 (L24) to 100 (L53) Magic Damage. While Arcane Infusion is active, the Mana cost of this spell is reduced by 25%.

arcane spear iv.name: Arcane Spear IV
arcane spear iv.description: Hurl a spear of arcane energy at your target, dealing 150 (L36) to 200 (L36) Magic Damage. While Arcane Infusion is active, the Mana cost of this spell is reduced by 25%.

arcane spear v.name: Arcane Spear V
arcane spear v.description: Hurl a spear of arcane energy at your target, dealing 325 (152) to 375 (155) Magic Damage. While Arcane Infusion is active, the Mana cost of this spell is reduced by 25%.

arcane spear vi.name: Arcane Spear VI
arcane spear vi.description: Hurl a spear of arcane energy at your target, dealing 425 (L56) to 475 (L60) Magic Damage. While Arcane Infusion is active, the Mana cost of this spell is reduced by 25%.

arcane surge.name: Arcane Surge
arcane surge.description: Fill your target's mind with a mana surge, granting them 90 Mana at the cost of 130 Mana.
notes: Requires Line of Sight.

arcane ward.name: Arcane Ward
arcane ward.description: Shield your target with an arcane ward, absorbing 600 Spell Damage received for 15 seconds.

arch lich.name: Arch Lich
arch lich.description: Surrender your body to arch-lichdom, increasing your Mana Regeneration by 35 at the cost of 50 Health every 6 seconds.
notes: This spell does not stack with other Primary Regeneration effects.

arch spellshield.name: Arch Spellshield
arch spellshield.description: A magical shield encircles you, increasing your HP by 150, AC by 30 and Magic Resistance by 30.

aria de grave.name: Aria De Grave
aria de grave.description: Play an Aria de Grave, reducing an enemy target's Movement Speed by 40% and Attack Speed by 20% for 18 seconds.

aria de larghissimo.name: Aria De Larghissimo
aria de larghissimo.description: Play an Aria de Larghissimo, reducing an enemy target's Movement Speed by 50% and Attack Speed by 25% for 18 seconds.

aria de largo.name: Aria De Largo
aria de largo.description: Play an Aria de Largo, reducing an enemy target's Movement Speed by 30% and Attack Speed by 15% for 18 seconds.

aria de lento.name: Aria de Lento
aria de lento.description: Oppress nearby targets with an echoing aria, decreasing their Movement Speed by 20% and Attack Speed by 10% for 18 seconds.
notes: This ability is considered a Secondary Slow.

armor break.name: Armor Break
armor break.description: Breaks the armor of your target, reducing their AC by 1 (L1) to 26 (L60) for 30 seconds. Stacks 3 times.

aspect of vampirism.name: Aspect of Vampirism
aspect of vampirism.description: Invoke a vampiric aspect, granting you a chance to activate Vampirism on melee attacks for 1 hour. Vampirism: Leech the life force of your target, dealing 1 (L1) to 30 (L60) Corruption Damage and restoring your Health by the same amount.

assail the dead.name: Assail the Dead
assail the dead.description: Ward off a target undead with a blast of energy, dealing 525 Holy Damage.
notes: Requires Line of Sight

beleaguer the elements.name: Beleaguer the Elements
beleaguer the elements.description: Wards an elemental target with elemental energy for 245 points of Magic Damage.

atonement.name: Atonement
atonement.description: Submit your target to holy judgement, granting them a chance to forget past trangressions. This spell has a chance to critically fail.

aura of resistance.name: Aura of Resistance
aura of resistance.description: Increases the Intelligence for your group by 1 (L1) to 15 (L60) and Spell Damage by 10%
notes: This is a toggled aura, its effects last as long as it is active and players are within range.

aura of the inquisitive.name: Aura of the Inquisitive
aura of the inquisitive.description: Envelop your group in an inquisitive aura, increasing their Mana Regeneration by 1 (L1) to 3 (L60).
notes: This is a toggled aura, its effects last as long as it is active and players are within range.

aura of the pious.name: Aura of the Pious
aura of the pious.description: 'Your strength is increased by 10 for 1 hour.'

aura of vampirism.name: Aura of Vampirism
aura of vampirism.description: An aura which causes the Melee and Ranged attacks of your group to have a chance to drain life from your enemies, dealing 1 to 30 damage and healing.
effects: Add Proc: Decrease Hitpoints by 1 (L1) to 30 (L60)
Add Proc: Increase Hitpoints by 1 (L1) to 30 (L60) (Self)
notes: This is an aura, it is toggled on or off and persists indefinitely
Must be grouped with the Shadow Knight to receive benefit.
Will proc with archery and thrown attacks as well.

avoidance.name: Avoidance
avoidance.description: Attempt to avoid Magical Attacks, reducing Magical Damage dealt to you by 20% for 3 seconds. Triggers cooldown of Acrobatics abilities.

backdraft.name: Backdraft
backdraft.description: Causes a backdraft, knocking your target back.
effects: Applies a knockback effect to targets hit by Blast of Air while under the effects of Engulfed by Fire from Elemental Fire. Knockback effect is 20 meters.

backlash of fire (fire elemental).name: Backlash of Fire (Fire Elemental)
backlash of fire (fire elemental).description: Surround your group with lashing fire, increasing their Casting Speed by 10% and granting them a Damage Shield that deals 1 (L1) to 15 (L57) Fire Damage when hit for 10 minutes.
effects: Increase casting speed by 10% and apply a fire damage shield.

barbed arrow.name: Barbed Arrow
barbed arrow.description: Fire a barbed arrow at your target, dealing 50% Weapon Ratio Damage plus 2 Bleed Damage every 6s for 18s.
effects: Decrease Hitpoints by 80% Weapon Damage Ratio plus 2 Bleed Damage every 6 seconds for 18 seconds
notes: This ability requires a bow and arrows. As of 0.25.0.1 patch.

bat swarm pet tier 1.name: Bat Swarm Pet Tier 1

rat swarm pet tier 2.name: Rat Swarm Pet Tier 2

blazing shield.name: Blazing Shield

blazing sun.name: Blazing Sun

blessed barrier.description: Calls on holy magic to create a barrier, absorbing 25 Damage for 15 seconds.

blessing of sanctuary.description: Bless your group with sanctuary, reducing all damage received by 20% for 20 seconds. This spell inflicts Recently Exhausted upon expiration, preventing reapplication of this effect for 20 minutes.

blinding powder.description: Throw blinding powder at your target, incapacitating them for 10 seconds.
notes: This ability disables auto-attack.
This ability is removed by damage.

blink.name: Blink
blink.description: Teleport yourself a short distance forward.

Does not teleport you over the edge of a drop offs (cliffs).

blistering sun.description: Expose your target to the blistering sun, dealing 424 Fire Damage.

Certain actions will immediately break invis, such as turning on auto-attack, casting a spell, using certain combat skills, being damaged by an attack or direct-damage spell, opening (but not receiving) a trade window, looting corpses or getting the invis buff dispelled. This list might not be exhaustive.

To confirm if a non-indifferent NPC can see invis, cast invis on yourself and /consider it. If the faction message changes to indifferent, then it will not see you. If the faction message is anything else, it can still see you. If an NPC was indifferent to you to begin with, this method will not be informative.

invisibility.name: Invisibility
invisibility.description: Shroud a target group member in darkness, rendering them unseen by the undead for 10 minutes.
notes: Must be grouped with your target.

Certain actions will immediately break invis, such as turning on auto-attack, casting a spell, using certain combat skills, being damaged by an attack or direct-damage spell, opening (but not receiving) a trade window, looting corpses or getting the invis buff dispelled. This list might not be exhaustive.

To confirm if a non-indifferent NPC can see invis, cast invis on yourself and /consider it. If the faction message changes to indifferent, then it will not see you. If the faction message is anything else, it can still see you. If an NPC was indifferent to you to begin with, this method will not be informative.
This spell has a slight chance to end early.

This list might not be exhaustive.

To confirm if a non-indifferent NPC can see invis, cast invis on yourself and /consider it. If the faction message changes to indifferent, then it will not see you. If the faction message is anything else, it can still see you. If an NPC was indifferent to you to begin with, this method will not be informative.

vale of zintar gate.description: Teleport yourself to Vale of Zintar.
notes: You cannot successfully teleport while encumbered

vale of zintar portal.name: Vale of Zintar Portal
vale of zintar portal.description: Send your group through a portal to Vale of Zintar.
notes: You cannot successfully teleport while encumbered

vampirism.name: Vampirism
vampirism.description: Leech the life force of your target, dealing 1 (L1) to 30 (L60) Corruption Damage and restoring your Health by the same amount.
notes: Proc effect from the Necromancer buff Aspect of Vampirism.

venomous deluge.name: Venomous Deluge
venomous deluge.description: Shower your target with a poisonous deluge, dealing 40 Poison Damage and an additional 20 damage every 6 seconds for 30 seconds.

vial of smoke.name: Vial of Smoke
vial of smoke.description: Drop all aggro and enter stealth
notes: Requires a Vial of Smoke (reagent), which is sold from a poison maker.

vile deluge.name: Vile Deluge
vile deluge.description: Shower your target with a poisonous deluge, dealing 250 Poison Damage and an additional 125 damage every 6 seconds for 30 seconds.

virulent virus.name: Virulent Virus
virulent virus.description: Infect your target with a disease, dealing 125 Disease Damage every 6 seconds for 1 minute.
notes: Requires Line of Sight on Cast

void strength.name: Void Strength
void strength.description: Extract power from your target, decreasing their Strength by 15 and increasing yours by the same amount for 5 minutes.

wailing ice.name: Wailing Ice
wailing ice.description: Rend your target with spiritual frost, dealing 135 Cold Damage.

wailing vocalization.name: Wailing Vocalization
wailing vocalization.description: Scream like a metallic warrior at your target, dealing 29 Magic Damage, with 150% to 290% Damage Variance.
notes: Shares a cooldown with other shouts.

ward the elements.name: Ward the Elements
ward the elements.description: Wards an elemental target with elemental energy for 30 points of Magic Damage.

wasp swarm pet tier 1.name: Wasp Swarm Pet Tier 1
wasp swarm pet tier 1.description: Entreat the wild, calling forth a swarm of wasps to temporarily fight alongside you.

water shield.name: Water Shield
water shield.description: An elemental shield of frigid water surrounds you, increasing Cold and Fire Resistance by 10 causing attackers to be afflicted by Chilled, reducing their Movement Speed 25%, decreasing their Electricity Resistance by 10 for 3 seconds.

way of the earth.name: Way of the Earth
way of the earth.description: Enter the Way of the Earth, increasing your Armor Class by 15%. While Way of the Earth is active, Celestial Fury is empowered to also increase your Physical Damage Reduction by 10%.
effects: Add Proc to Ability: Celestial Strike
notes: This is a stance, it will remain active indefinitely or until switched to a different stance

way of the flame.name: Way of the Flame
way of the flame.description: Enter the Way of the Flame, increasing your Fire Resistance by 15% and reducing Lava Damage and other Fire based Environmental Damage by 50%. While Way of the Flame is active, your Celestial Strike ability is empowered by Flame, causing it to apply Fists of Flame to your target, dealing 1 (L4) to 16 (L60) Fire Damage every 6 seconds for 30 seconds.
effects: Add Proc to Ability: Celestial Strike
notes: This is a stance, it will remain active indefinitely or until switched to a different stance

way of the water.name: Way of the Water
way of the water.description: Enter the Way of the Water, increasing your Cold Resistance by 15% and Underwater Breathing by 50%. While Way of the Water is active, your Celestial Strike ability is empowered by Water, giving it a 15% chance of procing an additional Celestial Vitality cast, which also hits group members within 20 meters.
effects: Add Proc to Ability: Celestial Strike
notes: This is a stance, it will remain active indefinitely or until switched to a different stance

way of the wind.name: Way of the Wind
way of the wind.description: Enter the Way of the Wind increasing Movement Speed by 10%. While Way of the Wind is active, Celestial Fury is empowered to also give you a chance to proc an additional primary hand melee swing or ranged attack.
effects: Add Proc to Ability: Celestial Strike
notes: This is a stance, it will remain active indefinitely or until switched to a different stance

weak heal.name: Weak Heal
weak heal.description: Weakly heals the wounds of a friendly target, healing them for 6 Health.

weapon shield.name: Weapon Shield
weapon shield.description: Shield yourself with a weapon, reducing your Physical Damage received by 5%.
notes: Toggled stance, persists until canceled.

whirling shadows.name: Whirling Shadows
whirling shadows.description: Conjure whirling shadows that grip your target, dealing 9 Corruption Damage every 6 seconds and decreasing their Movement Speed by 50% for 48 seconds.
notes: Requires line of sight

whispers of eth-es.name: Whispers of Eth-es
whispers of eth-es.description: Bless your target with the whispers of Eth-es, increasing their Mana Regeneration by 400% for 24 seconds.
notes: Requires Line of Sight

whistling shot.name: Whistling Shot
whistling shot.description: Fire a whistling shot at your target, dealing 90% Weapon Damage plus 1 (L1) to 20 (L60) Physical Damage, and increasing Threat by 25 (L1) to 250 (L60). This ability requires a bow and arrows. This ability shares a cooldown with other Might abilities.
effects: Decrease Hitpoints by 1 (L1) to 20 (L60) Physical Damage

windblast.name: Windblast
windblast.description: Blast your target with buffeting winds, dealing 581 Magic Damage and interrupting their casting.

winged swarm.name: Winged Swarm
winged swarm.description: Engulf your target with a winged swarm, dealing 30 Poison Damage every 6 seconds for 60 Seconds.
notes: Requires Line of Sight on Cast

winter's bite.name: Winter's Bite
winter's bite.description: Freeze your target with winter's bite, dealing 44 Cold Damage and decreasing their Movement Speed by 25% for 3 seconds. Additionally, if the target is under the effect of any spell in the Embers line, this spell gains a damage bonus.

winter's chill.name: Winter's Chill
winter's chill.description: Freeze your target with winter's chill, dealing 12 Cold Damage and decreasing their Movement Speed by 25% for 3 seconds. Additionally, if the target is under the effect of any spell in the Restore line, this spell gains a damage bonus.

winter's fury.name: Winter's Fury
winter's fury.description: Freeze your target with winter's fury, dealing 141 (L1.52) to 200 (L1.63) Cold Damage and decreasing their Movement Speed by 15% for 3 seconds. Additionally, if the target is under the effect of any spell in the Embers line, this spell gains a damage bonus.

winter's wrath.name: Winter's Wrath
winter's wrath.description: Freeze your target with winter's wrath, dealing 298 (L1.44) to 340 (L1.5) Cold Damage and decreasing their Movement Speed by 25% for 3 seconds. Additionally, if the target is under the effect of any spell in the Embers line, this spell gains a damage bonus.

wintery embrace.name: Wintery Embrace
wintery embrace.description: Slows your enemies Attack Speed by 4% per application, stacking up to 5 times for 30 seconds. Secondary slow. Does not stack with other secondary slows.
notes: Stacks up to 5 times.

wolf form.name: Wolf Form
wolf form.description: Shapeshift your group into a pack of wolves, increasing their Movement Speed by 40% (L8) to 60% (L60).

wolf spirit pet tier 1.description: Summons a Wolf Spirit to serve you. Persists until death of pet or master.
notes: Persists until death of pet or master (pet does persist through zoning).

notes: Requires line of sight

zeal.description: Haste your target, increasing their Melee Attack Speed by 40% (L44) to 45% (L50) for 30 minutes.
